stemHtml:
For pre-flight planning purposes what is the required fuel for take-off for an IFR flight with a turbine engine jet aircraft?

Taxi fuel (with APU usage included) :120 lb
Climb fuel : 420 lb
Cruise distance : 720 NAM
Cruise fuel consumption : 4 lb/NAM
Descent fuel : 230 lb
Approach and Landing fuel : 250 lb
Alternate fuel : 650 lb
Contingency fuel : 5% Trip fuel
Final reserve fuel : 2050 lb/h
Fuel for missed approach at alternate : 350 lb
Extra Fuel: 0 lb
Discretionary Fuel: 0 lb
